name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who will not install Interceptly / MeetAlfred / Dripify / Waalaxy. Supports two campaign types — full-sequence (connect + three-message post-accept conversation) and connect-only (connection requests only, no post-accept sequence) — selected at draft time and validated at registration. Plans multi-touch campaigns against a client-supplied ICP and saved Sales Navigator search, executes the daily outreach loop directly in Sales Nav via Chrome MCP using the row-level three-dot menu method with explicit skip-rule handling, and keeps all state in a single workbook inside /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day + 100/week connection cap across all active campaigns regardless of type, routes every reply through rockstarr-reply for approval, fires a single urgent client email per detect-replies run summarizing every newly-staged reply draft (via rockstarr-infra:notify-reply-ready), and confirms the browser is signed in to the correct LinkedIn before every run. Page-follow invites moved to the rockstarr-social plugin in 0.2.0 — install that alongside this one if you also want monthly page-growth automation.
